name: AREthSerializeMessage
title: AREthSerializeMessage
syntax: dword AREthSerializeMessage( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, CHAR buffer[] ); // form 1
dword AREthSerializeMessage( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, BYTE buffer[] ); // from 2
dword AREthSerializeMessage( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, struct buffer[] ); // form 3
description: Serializes a SOME/IP message into a data buffer. Both the SOME/IP header and the payload are serialized.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the message that was created with AREthCreateMessage, for example.

parameters.name: bufferLength
parameters.description: Length of the buffer parameter in bytes.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Data buffer into which the SOME/IP message is serialized.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
